constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (id_agent_crea) REFERENCES utilisateur(id_user) ON DELETE SET NULL
FOREIGN KEY (id_commune) REFERENCES commune(fid) ON DELETE SET NULL
FOREIGN KEY (id_mission) REFERENCES mission(id_mission) ON DELETE SET NULL
FOREIGN KEY (id_projet) REFERENCES projet(id_projet) ON DELETE SET NULL

indexes.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX borne_onep_pkey ON ep.borne_onep USING btree (fid)
CREATE INDEX ep_borne_onep_proj_mission_idx ON ep.borne_onep USING btree (id_projet, id_mission)
CREATE INDEX ep_borne_onep_proj_mission_updated_idx ON ep.borne_onep USING btree (id_projet, id_mission, updated_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ep_borne_onep_uuid_uq ON ep.borne_onep USING btree (uuid) WHERE (uuid IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_borne_onep_geom ON ep.borne_onep USING gist (geom)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX borne_onep_pkey ON ep.borne_onep USING btree (fid)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX borne_onep_uuid_key ON ep.borne_onep USING btree (uuid)
CREATE INDEX idx_borne_onep_geom ON ep.borne_onep USING gist (geom)

constraints.definition: CHECK (role IS NULL OR (role::text = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::character varying, 'project_manager'::character varying, 'editeur_terrain'::character varying, 'editeur_bureau'::character varying, 'viewer_mobile'::character varying, 'viewer'::character varying, 'superadmin'::character varying, 'exploitant_srm'::character varying]::text[])))
